Professional Summary

Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience building modern web applications and automating complex processes. Proficient in React, TypeScript, Node.js, and Python, with a strong focus on scalable systems, performance, and clean architecture.

Background in geotechnology and data analysis, bringing a unique analytical mindset to software development. Experienced in developing end-to-end solutions, from intuitive frontends to robust backend systems and database integration.
